2739
International Summer Internship 2026
Fully Funded Program
About
The Program
Sri Eshwar College of Engineering (SECE), Coimbatore, offers international students a fully funded two-week program combining hands-on technology projects, industry engagement, and cultural immersion across South India.
Duration
July 27 - Aug 09,  2026
Apply By
5th July, 2026
Why
Coimbatore?
Often called the
“Manchester of South India,”
Coimbatore is one of India’s fastest-growing industrial and technology hubs. Home to hundreds of manufacturing firms, IT companies, and startups, the city offers an authentic window into how Indian engineering and entrepreneurship operate at scale. SECE’s location in this ecosystem means internship participants benefit from proximity to real industry — not just classrooms.
Begin Your Journey
Our streamlined application process starts with a simple registration. Access the portal to receive updates on eligibility requirements and deadlines for the 2026 cohort.
Fully Funded Program (Covered: Free Stay, Food, Airport Transfers & Sightseeing & Not Covered : Flights to/from India)
Learn Build Explore Experience India
Scan below QR code to apply
Programmes
Track A
Smart Systems &
IoT
Dive into the world of connected devices, sensor networks, and intelligent automation. Participants in this track will work on real IoT deployment scenarios, exploring hardware-software integration, data collection pipelines, and smart system design.
Track B
Applied AI & Intelligence
Explore how artificial intelligence is reshaping industries. This track takes participants from foundational machine learning concepts to real-world applied AI — including computer vision, natural language processing, and decision intelligence.
Programme
Highlights
Hands-on laboratory & industry expert sessions
Team-based innovation projects with mentoring
Live industry visits & Demo Day exhibition
Indian cultural immersion activities
Certificate of completion issued by SECE
Who
Can Apply?
We invite international students seeking hands-on training and global exposure:
UG & PG students from any recognized international university.
Cross-disciplinary: Engineering, Arts, or Science backgrounds.
Tech Enthusiasts: Specifically designed for those interested in the future of technology and innovation.
All participants receive Complimentary Cultural Tours to explore the heritage of South India.
No prior advanced technical experience is required
